# terrible_ngine_io_cloudstack_storage_pool (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the storage pool.
- `zone` (String) Name of the zone in which the host should be deployed.

### Optional

- `allocation_state` (String) Allocation state of the storage pool.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `capacity_bytes` (Number) Bytes CloudStack can provision from this storage pool.
- `capacity_iops` (Number) Bytes CloudStack can provision from this storage pool.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cluster` (String) Name of the cluster.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `hypervisor` (String) Required when creating a zone scoped pool. Possible values are `KVM`, `VMware`, `BareMetal`, `XenServer`, `LXC`, `HyperV`, `UCS`, `OVM`, `Simulator`.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the storage pool should be managed by CloudStack. Only considered on creation.
- `pod` (String) Name of the pod.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `provider` (String) Name of the storage provider e.g. SolidFire, SolidFireShared, DefaultPrimary, CloudByte.
- `scope` (String) The scope of the storage pool. Defaults to cluster when `cluster` is provided, otherwise zone.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) State of the storage pool.
- `storage_tags` (String) Tags associated with this storage pool.
- `storage_url` (String) URL of the storage pool. Required if *state=present*.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `created` (String) Date of the pool was created.
- `disk_size_allocated` (Number) The pool's currently allocated disk space.
- `disk_size_total` (Number) The total size of the pool.
- `disk_size_used` (Number) The pool's currently used disk size.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `overprovision_factor` (String) The overprovision factor of the storage pool.
- `path` (String) The storage pool path used in the storage_url.
- `storage_capabilities` (String) Capabilities of the storage pool.
- `suitable_for_migration` (Boolean) Whether the storage pool is suitable to migrate a volume or not.
